creator: aryeh@rad-inet.com
text:
On my friend's SIS system with a "generic" 44x ATAPI CD-ROM it will boot
the disk that comes with the paper version of Lehey's book.  Once
it goes through device probing and such (I tried messing with the vis
config to no luck) once we get to the commit stage it says it can not
find the CD-ROM (scrolling back into the dmesgs no Xcd's where found).

Since all the hardware is "generic" (according to Micro$lut) and there
are no manuals to speak of I can not provide too much more detail.

Fix: 

Kill bad vendors and Bill ;-)
How-To-Repeat: Don's ask me ;-) [I have been a FreeBSD sysadmin since 2.0.5 ;-)]
